en-GB.description:
Glamora – Beauty at Your Door
Glamora brings salon-quality beauty services directly to your home. No more waiting in queues or traveling — book professional beauty providers in just a few taps.

Key Services:

Nails & Manicure/Pedicure combos

Hair styling & braiding

Makeup for everyday or events

Spa & facial treatments

Why Glamora?

Browse verified and reviewed beauty providers

Flexible scheduling and travel fee options

Secure in-app payments

Real-time messaging with your provider

Easy booking, no hidden fees

Perfect For:

Busy professionals

Brides & event-ready clients

At-home pampering enthusiasts

Anyone who wants trusted beauty services without leaving home

Experience the convenience of at-home beauty with Glamora — your trusted beauty assistant.
en-GB.promoText: Book top beauty pros for nails, hair, makeup & spa at home. Verified providers, easy payments, and flexible scheduling.
en-GB.title: Glamora
en-GB.subtitle: Beauty Services at Home
